text.message: Blue will win if you keep feeding him trades
Yea tried to stop early but no good
stop early by robbing me over and over
trade an ore and i wont rob again
Na oj is out for me
And sadly red can’t take army
now maybe, i thought with army you could already have 7
red takes road long term imo
move it off his free 1.5 cards for a 0.5 card
GMFischer: red takes road long term imo
take his wood and build road
